title: Text Templates for Item Description
excerpt: Hello! This has been driving me crazy to figure out. I’m trying to edit / make templates for the item description card but can not find how to do this. This is what I’m seeing as the current templates. Any idea?

posts.author: andrewpistachio13 (Andrew M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! This has been driving me crazy to figure out. I’m trying to edit / make templates for the item description card but can not find how to do this. This is what I’m seeing as the current templates. Any idea?

Screenshot 2025-04-09 153125316×352 13.1 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you create your template and then highlight it all you should get an option to save as a ‘snippet’ which is like a template.

image1612×541 28.9 KB

posts.author: RulzB (Raul Bustamnte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I was looking for this option but it seems that in Monday Dev is not available.

Is a plug in or a native feature?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe it’s native… I don’t recall downloading anything to get it active.

posts.author: selena512 (selena)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Andrew! Editing item description templates can be tricky. Usually, these templates are managed within your platform’s settings under “Templates” or “Item Descriptions.” If you don’t see an option there, it might require custom coding or help from support. Can you share which platform you’re using? That way, I can help you better!
